overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white jacket walking through a futuristic urban plaza lined with colorful faction banners. The character approaches a large modern building with 'MAST' signage, turns to view the open plaza, then proceeds up the grand stairs and enters the building's lobby featuring 'UC' reception branding.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with faction banners

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pathway toward the MAST building entrance

entered.detail: tall vertical banners with red, blue, and white faction symbols lining the right side of the walkway
large futuristic building with curved architecture and MAST signage visible on the upper facade
overhead curved roof structure providing partial cover over the walkway
rectangular planter with green foliage and red flowers

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered pedestrian pathway lined with colorful faction banners on the right. The modern MAST building looms ahead with its distinctive curved architecture, while the pathway features hexagonal paving stones and glass railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with distant city buildings

events.description: character performs a 180-degree turn to face the opposite direction, now looking toward the open plaza

agents.ego_description: turning around to view the open plaza and distant buildings behind, then walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large white rectangular building with multiple tiers visible in the distance across the plaza
expansive open paved area with water features and scattered trees

segments.scene_description: After turning around, the character walks away from the MAST building toward an open plaza. The colorful banners now appear in the distance on the right, while a large white building dominates the view ahead across the expansive paved area.

scene_state.functional_zone: MAST building approach with grand staircase

events.description: character turns left to face the MAST building entrance, leaving the main pathway
character begins ascending the wide grand staircase toward the entrance doors

agents.ego_description: turning toward the building entrance and climbing the wide staircase with yellow accent lines

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking near the building entrance

entered.detail: wide white stairs with yellow safety strips leading up to the building entrance
illuminated UC logo above the glass entrance doors indicating United Colonies facility

segments.scene_description: The character turns left toward the MAST building and begins ascending the grand staircase. The UC signage becomes visible above the entrance doors as the character approaches, while the open plaza and banners fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: UC lobby reception area with seating

events.description: character enters the building through automatic glass doors into the lobby

agents.ego_description: walking into the lobby and approaching the UC reception desk while passing modern seating furniture

notable_agents.action: receptionist or staff member seated behind the UC desk

entered.detail: large reception counter with illuminated UC logo and staff member behind it
modern gray lounge chairs and circular coffee tables arranged in the lobby
illuminated wall signage with VANGUARD text and winged logo

segments.scene_description: The character enters the building through glass doors into a well-lit lobby. The interior features a UC reception desk ahead, modern seating to the right, and VANGUARD signage on the left wall, with reflective dark glass panels lining the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban plaza that transitions from an outdoor pedestrian walkway into a sleek corporate lobby. It begins with the character walking along a covered pathway of hexagonal paving stones, passing colorful faction banners as the curved architecture of the MAST building looms ahead. The camera then pivots away from the structure to reveal an expansive paved plaza dominated by a large white building in the distance. As the character turns back toward the MAST building, the scene shifts to an ascent up a grand staircase where UC signage becomes visible above the entrance. Finally, the camera glides through glass doors into a well-lit interior featuring a UC reception desk, modern seating, and VANGUARD signage against reflective dark glass walls.
